UpdateSourceArgs:
-c "set -e
halo="{{$FullBaseDir}}SAPP_CE/cg/init.txt"
sapp="{{$FullBaseDir}}SAPP_CE/cg/sapp/init.txt"

test -f "$halo"
test -f "$sapp"

if ! grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*sv_maxplayers[[:space:]]+' "$halo"; then
  sed -i '/^[[:space:]]*load[[:space:]]*$/i sv_maxplayers 16\
' "$halo"
fi

append_if_missing() {
  file="$1"
  key="$2"
  line="$3"
  if ! grep -Eq "^[[:space:]]*${key}[[:space:]]+" "$file"; then
    printf '\n%s\n' "$line" >> "$file"
  fi
}

append_if_missing "$sapp" console_input 'console_input true'
append_if_missing "$sapp" chat_console_echo 'chat_console_echo true'
append_if_missing "$sapp" antispam 'antispam 0'
append_if_missing "$sapp" afk_kick 'afk_kick 0'
append_if_missing "$sapp" ping_kick 'ping_kick 0'
append_if_missing "$sapp" log 'log false'"
